paragraphs: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT), Gangtok is a unit of NIELIT institutions established by the Ministry of Communications & Information Technology, Government of India. It was established in 2010 with the prime objective of creating specialised manpower in the field of Information Electronics and Communication Technologies (IECT). The institute offers training & educational services to improve employment opportunities and facilitate quality manpower at affordable cost, which in turn will lead to further growth of the IECT industry in the region. At present, NIELIT Gangtok offers nearly 20 short-term as well as non-formal courses at UG and PG levels.

NIELIT Gangtok offers short-term courses to encourage digital literacy and enhance the IT skills of individuals. The duration of these courses ranges between 20-200 hours. The institute invites applications for short-term courses throughout the year. The admissions are notified through press advertisements (Sikkim Express, Hamro Prajashakti, Dainik Jagran, etc.) and the centre’s website (nielit.gov.in/gangtok) from time to time.
